mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) FROM cb_order o JOIN cb_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.technician_id = #{techId} AND oi.deleted = 0 WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(o.appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND o.status NOT IN (0, 7, 8, 9) AND o.deleted = 0

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) FROM cb_order o JOIN cb_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.technician_id = #{techId} AND oi.deleted = 0 WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(o.appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND o.status = 6 AND o.deleted = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_walkin_session ws WHERE ws.technician_id = #{techId} AND ws.deleted = 0 AND ws.status IN (2, 3) AND FROM_UNIXTIME(ws.check_in_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE())

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) FROM cb_order o JOIN cb_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.technician_id = #{techId} AND oi.deleted = 0 WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(o.appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND o.status != 0 AND o.deleted = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_walkin_session ws WHERE ws.technician_id = #{techId} AND ws.deleted = 0 AND ws.status != 4 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(ws.check_in_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE())

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) FROM cb_order o JOIN cb_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.technician_id = #{techId} AND oi.deleted = 0 WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(o.appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND o.status IN (7, 8, 9) AND o.deleted = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_walkin_session ws WHERE ws.technician_id = #{techId} AND ws.deleted = 0 AND ws.status = 4 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(ws.check_in_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE())

SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(order_income) FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(oi.tech_income) IS NOT NULL AND SUM(oi.tech_income) > 0 THEN SUM(oi.tech_income) WHEN SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.qty) > 0 THEN SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.qty) ELSE MAX(o.pay_amount) END AS order_income FROM cb_order o JOIN cb_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.technician_id = #{techId} AND oi.deleted = 0 WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(o.appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND o.status = 6 AND o.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND o.deleted = 0 GROUP BY o.id ) t) , 0) + COALESCE( (SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN o.tech_income IS NOT NULL AND o.tech_income > 0 THEN o.tech_income ELSE COALESCE(o.pay_amount, 0) END ) FROM cb_order o JOIN cb_walkin_session ws ON ws.id = o.session_id WHERE o.order_type = 2 AND o.technician_id = #{techId} AND o.deleted = 0 AND ws.status = 3 AND ws.deleted = 0 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(ws.check_in_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) , 0)

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.appoint_time AS appointTime, o.status, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN oi.tech_income IS NOT NULL THEN oi.tech_income ELSE oi.unit_price * oi.qty END ), 0) AS techIncome, m.nickname AS memberNickname, m.avatar AS memberAvatar FROM cb_order o JOIN cb_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.technician_id = #{techId} AND oi.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN cb_member m ON m.id = o.member_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE FROM_UNIXTIME(o.appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND o.status NOT IN (0, 8, 9) AND o.deleted = 0 GROUP BY o.id, o.order_no, o.appoint_time, o.status, o.pay_amount, m.nickname, m.avatar ORDER BY o.appoint_time ASC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status

SELECT merchant_id AS merchantId, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND merchant_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY merchant_id ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT technician_id AS technicianId, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND technician_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY technician_id ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_order o WHERE o.technician_id = #{techId} AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status = 1 AND o.order_type = 1

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%H') AS hour, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%m-%d') AS label, FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ymd, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY ymd, label ORDER BY ymd

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

SELECT o.id AS id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.status AS status, o.service_mode AS serviceMode, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.appoint_time AS appointTime, o.create_time AS createTime, o.start_time AS startTime, o.end_time AS endTime, o.remark AS remark, o.member_id AS memberId, COALESCE(m.nickname, '') AS memberNickname, COALESCE(m.mobile, '') AS memberMobile, o.service_name AS serviceName, o.service_duration AS serviceDuration FROM cb_order o LEFT JOIN cb_member m ON m.id = o.member_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_type = 1 AND o.status != 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM cb_order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.technician_id = #{techId} AND oi.deleted = 0 )
AND o.status IN
#{s}
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT 200
